item.title: firewall.ts EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS not centralized in config/defaults.ts
item.intent: firewall.ts must not define its own timeout constant. EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS must import DOCTOR_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS from config/defaults.ts. No duplicate timeout literal remains in firewall.ts.
item.description: src/build/launcher/firewall.ts:31 defines const EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000 as a local constant. This was explicitly excluded from BUG-040 (which said 'Do NOT touch src/build/launcher/firewall.ts:25 — deferred to BUG-020 post-CQ-005'). CQ-005 is now done and the file stayed in build/launcher/. DOCTOR_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000 is already exported from src/config/defaults.ts — reuse it instead of maintaining a duplicate. Steps: (1) open src/build/launcher/firewall.ts; (2) remove the local const EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000 at line 31; (3) add import { DOCTOR_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS } from '../../config/defaults.js'; (4) replace EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS with DOCTOR_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS at all usage sites in the file; (5) run build/ tests to confirm no regression. Scope: one file, ~3 lines changed. Zero logic change — pure constant consolidation.
